title: Ted Chavez
compiled_truth: Ted Chavez is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-15 to 2001-05-10), Ted Chavez sent 5 and received 33 emails, totalling 38 interactions. Top correspondents: [Susan Scott](people/susan-scott) (3), [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (2), [Paul Cherry](people/paul-cherry) (2), [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (1), [Julia White](people/julia-white) (1).
